display_name.description: Name used for UI elements listing this Service.

user_labels.description: Labels which have been used to annotate the service. Label keys must start with a letter. Label keys and values may contain lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, and dashes. Label keys and values have a maximum length of 63 characters, and must be less than 128 bytes in size. Up to 64 label entries may be stored. For labels which do not have a semantic value, the empty string may be supplied for the label value.

telemetry.description: Configuration for how to query telemetry on a Service. Structure is [documented below](#nested_telemetry).

resource_name.description: The full name of the resource that defines this service. Formatted as described in https://cloud.google.com/apis/design/resource_names.

service_id.description: An optional service ID to use. If not given, the server will generate a service ID.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
